name: Espresso
description: Short and intense. Classic espresso shot.
preparation:
18g dose • 9 bar • 25–30s • ~30ml.
Preheat the cup and watch for an even flow.

name: Cappuccino
description: Espresso with steamed milk and a silky foam cap.
preparation:
1 espresso • 120–150ml steamed milk • 1–2cm microfoam.
Aim for a glossy, velvety texture.

name: Caffè Latte
description: Smooth, milk-forward coffee with a gentle espresso base.
preparation:
1 espresso • 200–250ml steamed milk.
Keep the foam thin and creamy.

name: Americano
description: Espresso topped with hot water for a clean, aromatic cup.
preparation:
120–180ml hot water + 1–2 espresso shots.
Water first, espresso second for better crema.
